personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS, Python, SQL, Data Quality & Governance

summary: Senior Data Engineer with deep experience building Python and SQL-based ETL pipelines, governed data platforms, dimensional models, and analytics-ready datasets across enterprise environments. Strong background with AWS, S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift, PySpark, data warehousing, data quality, governance, APIs, and migration from on-premises systems to cloud-based platforms. Experienced collaborating with technical and business stakeholders to translate requirements into reliable data solutions and reporting workflows.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, transforming raw operational data into governed, analytics-ready datasets for reporting and forecasting.
Developed hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena querying, and Redshift-backed analytics workloads.
Designed data models and optimized Oracle schemas for historical retention, trend analysis, reporting, and capacity forecasting use cases.
Integrated data from on-premises and cloud-based sources, including TrueSight, CA Wily, AppDynamics, Oracle, and AWS-based processing layers.
Implemented data quality checks, cleansing, validation, and reconciliation workflows to improve reporting accuracy and pipeline reliability.
Created Python/Streamlit dashboards and reporting layers to help technical and business stakeholders understand trends, risks, and operational insights.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Analyzed real-user performance datasets from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities adopted by engineering teams.
Supported AWS cloud migration planning by assessing monitoring, data collection, and operational readiness needs for critical systems.
Built operational dashboards and telemetry-driven insights using Dynatrace AppMon, Synthetics, EUM, and transaction tracing.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed enterprise monitoring environments with 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents and created reporting standards for application and infrastructure teams.
Built Perl/Ksh automation scripts for recurring data extraction, operational reporting, and performance analysis workflows.
Delivered technical documentation, training, and stakeholder enablement for enterprise teams adopting monitoring and reporting practices.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, R, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting, Java, C++
skills.AI/ML: Prophet, scikit-learn, Capacity Forecasting, GenAI/LLM Agents, Predictive Analytics

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed an AWS-based lakehouse platform using S3, Glue, Athena, PySpark, and Parquet to support scalable ETL, analytics-ready datasets, and governed data access patterns. Optimized storage layouts and compression for large-scale reporting workloads.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built Python/PySpark forecasting workflows that transformed telemetry data into predictive capacity insights and stakeholder-facing dashboards. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90% and supported trend analysis, data quality, and operational decision-making.

projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
projects.description: Built an automated Python pipeline for intake, scoring, tailoring, quality checks, and tracking using LLM APIs, FAISS semantic matching, structured JSON artifacts, and document rendering workflows.
